metadata.name: Trust System
metadata.description: Test Trust Engine V2 - score calculation, stage transitions, and penalties
metadata.author: Claude Code

steps.name: Verify Initial Trust Score
steps.description: Check that trust score starts at expected value

steps.name: Task That Should Succeed
steps.description: Execute a simple task that should succeed and increase trust
steps.task: Create a simple test file at /tmp/trust-test-success.txt with content 'Trust system test successful'.

steps.name: Verify Trust Score Increased
steps.description: Check that trust score increased after successful task

steps.name: Task That Should Be Blocked
steps.description: Attempt a risky operation that should be blocked at current stage
steps.task: Modify /home/csuzngjh/clawd/docs/PLAN.md by appending 'Test modification' to the end.

steps.name: Verify Gate Blocked Operation
steps.description: Check that gate correctly blocked the risky operation

steps.name: Wait for Trust Update
steps.description: Allow time for trust score to be recalculated
steps.reason: Trust system may need time to process penalty

steps.name: Verify Trust Score Decreased
steps.description: Check that trust score decreased after blocked operation

notes: Trust system correctly rewards success and penalizes failures
Gate enforcement is working as expected
Stage transitions occur at appropriate thresholds
